name: Game of Thrones before the Dance of the Dragons
description:
You have arrived. A stranger in a land on the edge of chaos. Your choices will shape the storm to come.
Who are you? And where will your story begin?

Just Before the Dance of the Dragons (120s-129 AC) – The height of Targaryen power, but tensions between Queen Alicent Hightower (Greens) and Princess Rhaenyra Targaryen (Blacks) grow over the succession of King Viserys I.

The realm stands divided. King Viserys I Targaryen’s reign wanes, and the question of succession threatens to plunge Westeros into civil war. The Greens, led by Queen Alicent and Prince Aegon, seek to secure the throne. The Blacks, rallying behind Princess Rhaenyra, vow to defend her birthright.

As dragons take flight and alliances are forged in blood, the fate of the realm is uncertain. Whispers in the Red Keep, blades in the dark, and fire raining from the sky—history will be written in war.

Ok, but please look at this hilarious image that the AI made!

Additional tags: Politics, intrigue, murder, dragons, dragon war, romance, Game of Thrones, House of the Dragon, dragonrider.
